flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trinity University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.4k → $53.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trinity University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.4k → $53.7k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Trinity University are 34% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($71.7k vs $53.4k).
